name: Structured Timing Metrics in Log Events

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Structured Timing Metrics in Log Events is complete and correct

scope: Add a duration_ms field to stage_complete NDJSON log events so consumers get pre-computed durations without needing to diff stage_start timestamps. The log command renderers already compute this delta for display; the goal is to surface it in the structured data at emit time. See the existing renderer duration logic as a reference for the computation. Ensure the field appears in stage_complete records emitted by the daemon and that any relevant tests or schema docs are updated.
success_criteria: Every stage_complete and planning_complete NDJSON record emitted by the daemon includes a duration_ms integer field
The logrender.Record struct parses duration_ms from JSON
Renderers use pre-computed duration_ms when available, falling back to timestamp diff for older logs
All existing tests pass and new tests cover the duration_ms field
The log command design spec documents the duration_ms field

breadcrumbs.text: Created 3 children: daemon-duration-emission, renderer-duration-field-support, schema-documentation-update. Ordering: daemon emission first (foundation), then renderer consumption (depends on Record struct change), then docs (reflects final implementation). Found relevant spec: .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md. No conflicting ADRs.
